testCases.name: happy path - booking succeeded
testCases.description: Seats reserved, payment requested, payment received message published, ticket generated. Booking succeeded.

_integrationTestNotes: Integration tests should verify: (1) ReserveSeatsActivity (HTTP connector) calls real seat reservation API and holds seats; (2) Activity_0lox1kf (Request Payment) calls real payment gateway and returns payment URL/reference; (3) msg-payment-received message is published by the real payment webhook handler with the paymentRequestId as correlation key; (4) Activity_0etdda4 (Generate Ticket) calls real ticket generation service; (5) Timer boundary event (AfterFiveMinutesTimer) requires time acceleration or real 5-minute wait in integration tests. NOTE: Error_11kp03o (ErrorSeatsNotAvailable) is defined in the BPMN but has no error boundary event on ReserveSeatsActivity or process-level catch — throwing this error from the job would cause an unhandled incident. If seats-not-available handling is desired, a BPMN change is needed: add an error boundary event on ReserveSeatsActivity that catches ErrorSeatsNotAvailable and routes to the Booking cancelled end event (Event_05eni0s).
